query: SELECT id, firstName, lastName, email, city, postalCode, customFields FROM leads WHERE customFields LIKE '%company_name%' OR customFields LIKE '%showroom%' OR customFields LIKE '%devenir%' OR customFields LIKE '%partenaire%' LIMIT 10;
